fire_and_forget with failing task logs error and does not re-raise.
_swallow_future_exception does nothing when the task succeeded.
_swallow_future_exception retrieves and logs the task's exception.
_swallow_inner_future_exception does nothing when the future succeeded.
_swallow_inner_future_exception retrieves and logs the future's exception.
